name: Bhadla Solar Park

name: Khavda Renewable Energy Park

name: Benban Solar Park
note: 41 separate plants sharing one desert site near Aswan.

name: Noor Ouarzazate Solar Complex
note: CSP towers + mirror fields with molten-salt storage at the gate of the Sahara.

name: Redstone CSP
note: Concentrated solar with ~12 hours of thermal storage.

name: Longyangxia Hydro–Solar Park
note: Paired with the Longyangxia dam, which smooths the solar output.

name: Urumqi Midong Solar Project
note: One of the largest single-site PV plants on Earth.

name: Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum Solar Park
note: Phased mega-park including a 700 MW CSP tower; still expanding.

name: Witznitz Energy Park
note: Germany's largest solar park, built on a former coal mine.

name: Gemini Solar + Storage
note: Includes a 380 MW / 1.4 GWh battery; powers Las Vegas evenings.

name: Mammoth Solar
note: Indiana farmland mega-project, coming online in phases.

name: Cauchari Solar Park
note: Built at ~4,000 m altitude in the Andes on the Puna plateau.

name: CEME1 Solar
note: In the Atacama — the sunniest desert on Earth.

name: Jiuquan Wind Power Base
note: A wind megabase strung across the Gobi wind corridor; still expanding.

name: Muppandal Wind Farm

name: Traverse Wind Energy Center
note: Largest single-phase wind farm in the US.

name: SunZia Wind

name: Markbygden Wind Farm
note: Europe's largest onshore wind complex, near the Arctic Circle.

name: Whitelee Wind Farm
note: UK's largest onshore wind farm, on moorland outside Glasgow.

name: Viking Wind Farm
note: On Shetland — one of the most productive wind sites anywhere.

name: Lake Turkana Wind Power

name: MacIntyre Wind Farm
note: One of the largest onshore wind farms in the southern hemisphere.

name: Golden Plains Wind Farm
note: Victoria's biggest wind project, built in two stages.

name: Zarafshan Wind Farm
note: Central Asia's largest wind farm.

name: Hornsea 3
note: Will overtake its siblings as one of the largest offshore farms anywhere.

name: Dogger Bank Wind Farm
note: Three phases ~130 km offshore; first power already flowing.

name: Seagreen Offshore Wind Farm
note: Scotland's largest offshore wind farm.

name: Hollandse Kust Zuid
note: Built entirely without subsidy — a milestone for offshore wind economics.

name: Baltic Power
note: Poland's first offshore wind farm.

name: Saint-Nazaire Offshore Wind Farm
note: France's first commercial offshore wind farm.

name: Yangjiang Shapa Offshore Wind
note: Part of Guangdong's huge offshore build-out.

name: Vineyard Wind 1
note: The first large-scale offshore wind farm in the US.

name: Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind
note: 176 turbines, 27 miles off Virginia Beach — the largest US offshore project.

name: Empire Wind 1
note: Will feed Brooklyn from the New York Bight.

note: A retired gas plant site on Monterey Bay turned into one of the world's largest battery installations.

name: Manatee Energy Storage Center
note: Charged by an adjacent solar plant.

name: Waratah Super Battery
note: Built as a giant 'shock absorber' for the Sydney grid.

name: Hornsdale Power Reserve

name: Collie Battery
note: Helping replace the coal plants next door; stages still coming online.

name: Blackhillock Battery
note: Europe's largest battery, soaking up Scottish wind.

name: Dalian Flow Battery
note: The world's largest vanadium flow battery — energy stored in tanks of liquid electrolyte.

name: Bisha Battery Energy Storage
note: One of the largest single-site batteries in the world.

name: Oasis de Atacama
note: Phased solar + storage targeting ~11 GWh — set to be the world's largest battery.

name: Ivanpah Solar Electric Generating System
note: Three CSP towers in the Mojave where 170,000 mirrors focus sunlight to boil water.

name: Cleve Hill Solar Park
note: The UK's largest solar farm, paired with a big battery on the Kent marshes.

name: Datong Solar Top Runner Base
note: Includes arrays laid out in the shape of giant pandas.

name: Fântânele-Cogealac Wind Farm
note: When completed it was one of the largest onshore wind farms in Europe.

name: Penonomé Wind Farm
note: Central America's largest wind farm.

name: Gemini Wind Farm
note: One of the first offshore farms built far from shore, ~85 km out.

name: Eraring Battery
note: Rising on the site of Australia's largest coal plant as it winds down.

name: Kapolei Energy Storage
note: Replaced Oahu's last coal plant with stored solar.

name: The Geysers

name: Larderello Geothermal Complex
note: Site of the world's first geothermal power station, running since 1913.

name: Hellisheiði Power Station

name: Olkaria Geothermal Complex
note: In the Great Rift Valley — geothermal supplies roughly 40% of Kenya's power.

name: Fengning Pumped Storage
note: The world's largest pumped-storage power station.

name: Bath County Pumped Storage
note: Called 'the world's largest battery' for decades before lithium arrived.

name: Dinorwig Power Station

note: Tunnelling between two existing dams to store ~350 GWh in the Snowy Mountains.
